item.title: Pizza and Shake Eating Challenge
item.description: A food challenge featuring a large pizza paired with a milkshake. Shows preparation, pacing, and attempting to finish a high-calorie meal under pressure.

media:content.media:title: Pizza and Shake Eating Challenge
media:content.media:description: A food challenge featuring a large pizza paired with a milkshake. Shows preparation, pacing, and attempting to finish a high-calorie meal under pressure.

item.title: Making vs Eating a Sandwich Challenge
item.description: A fast-paced challenge comparing sandwich making speed versus eating speed. Focus on timing, efficiency, and who finishes the full sandwich first.

media:content.media:title: Making vs Eating a Sandwich Challenge
media:content.media:description: A fast-paced challenge comparing sandwich making speed versus eating speed. Focus on timing, efficiency, and who finishes the full sandwich first.

item.title: Swamp Burger Food Challenge
item.description: A massive swamp-style burger challenge packed with stacked ingredients. Focus on preparation, eating speed, and completing a high-calorie extreme meal.

media:content.media:title: Swamp Burger Food Challenge
media:content.media:description: A massive swamp-style burger challenge packed with stacked ingredients. Focus on preparation, eating speed, and completing a high-calorie extreme meal.

item.title: Pizza Buffet Challenge Success Story
item.description: A personal food challenge at a pizza buffet featuring strategy, pacing, and endurance. Focus on eating variety, timing, and completing a high-volume meal experience.

media:content.media:title: Pizza Buffet Challenge Success Story
media:content.media:description: A personal food challenge at a pizza buffet featuring strategy, pacing, and endurance. Focus on eating variety, timing, and completing a high-volume meal experience.

item.title: Eating 50 Chicken Wings Challenge
item.description: A fast-paced eating challenge featuring 50 chicken wings. Focus on speed, endurance, and completing a large portion of food in one sitting.

media:content.media:title: Eating 50 Chicken Wings Challenge
media:content.media:description: A fast-paced eating challenge featuring 50 chicken wings. Focus on speed, endurance, and completing a large portion of food in one sitting.

item.title: Extreme Food Challenge Attempt
item.description: A high-intensity food challenge featuring a large, difficult meal. Focus on speed, endurance, and pushing limits to complete the challenge.

media:content.media:title: Extreme Food Challenge Attempt
media:content.media:description: A high-intensity food challenge featuring a large, difficult meal. Focus on speed, endurance, and pushing limits to complete the challenge.

item.title: 12-Pound Pizza Challenge for $500
item.description: Take on the 12-pound pizza challenge, showcasing a massive pizza, the techniques to eat it, and the $500 reward for completing this extreme food feat.

media:content.media:title: 12-Pound Pizza Challenge for $500
media:content.media:description: Take on the 12-pound pizza challenge, showcasing a massive pizza, the techniques to eat it, and the $500 reward for completing this extreme food feat.

item.title: McDonald's Challenge
item.description: Watch an extreme McDonald's challenge, featuring large orders, speed eating, and creative strategies to tackle a fast-food feast.

media:content.media:title: McDonald's Challenge
media:content.media:description: Watch an extreme McDonald's challenge, featuring large orders, speed eating, and creative strategies to tackle a fast-food feast.
